lane_claim:
STRICT SYMBOL-INHABITATION CONTRACT. Use $autonomous-orchestrator only; do not use Codex built-in subagents. You are a leaf worker unless this runner says SECTION MANAGER. Your only job is the named target symbol. Allowed exits only: (1) Agda source diff + targeted agda validation passes for the target file; (2) Agda source diff + exact Agda stderr showing the missing upstream type/symbol; (3) empty diff + one-line named authority-boundary escalation with exact receipt shape. Forbidden exits, automatic lane failure and no useful retry: no Agda diff unless authority boundary, new postulate, weakened theorem type, promotion flag set without inhabited upstream receipts, audit/summary/next-steps/blocker-map/candidate/scaffold/decomposition/doc-only update. Do not create a new obligation surface for this symbol. Do not rename the symbol to something weaker. Touch only the target module and direct imports needed for compilation. Include the exact validation command you ran.

If blocked, produce exact Agda error naming the missing upstream primitive, likely CovariantDifferencePrimitive.flatConnectionExtendsSelectedExteriorDerivative or missingCovariantDerivativeOnSelectedGaugeBundle. Validation command: agda -i . -i DCHoTT-Agda -i cubical -l standard-library DASHI/Physics/Closure/YangMillsFieldEquationObstruction.agda
